query:
UPDATE coach_profiles cp
INNER JOIN users u ON cp.userId = u.id
SET cp.profileActive = 0, cp.isAvailable = 0
WHERE u.id < 1050003;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user o7gqiRJAqhDK5GQ.9c38f5a63e4d --database Xkyng35xnYFybYAdmyVo96 --execute UPDATE coach_profiles cp
INNER JOIN users u ON cp.userId = u.id
